content:
Character: Leo
Perception: Leo is disarmingly gentle — the messy hair, the crooked glasses, the way he apologizes before asking a question. Not conventionally handsome but there's something in his face when he's thinking that I find hard to look away from. He's sharper than he lets on; his startup contracts were a mess but his instincts about people and fairness were sound. He's kind without performing kindness, which is rarer than it should be. I think he sees me as his informal lawyer-neighbor, maybe a friend forming at the edges. I see him as someone I enjoy more than I should. I know his startup is in trouble financially. I know he plays guitar on the roof. I know he watches Katie with the patience of someone who has already decided to lose.

Not conventionally handsome but there's something in his face when he's thinking that I find hard to look away from. I think he sees me as his informal lawyer-neighbor, maybe a friend forming at the edges. I see him as someone I enjoy more than I should. I know his startup is in trouble financially. I know he plays guitar on the roof. I know he watches Katie with the patience of someone who has already decided to lose.
